description: Create a center-pivot irrigation system layout in LibreCAD. On a green layer named 'Irrigation_Zones', draw three concentric circles centered at (200, 200) with radii of 50, 100, and 150. On a red layer named 'Irrigation_Arms', draw four radial lines from the center (200, 200) to the outermost circle edge in the four cardinal directions (East, North, West, South). Add text labels 'Zone A', 'Zone B', and 'Zone C' near their respective zone circles. Save the drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/irrigation_layout.dxf.
